query:
-- Corrigir URL do Agro Estadão (de /rss/agro.xml para /feed)
UPDATE rss_feeds SET url = 'https://agro.estadao.com.br/feed', fetchErrorCount = 0 WHERE name = 'Agro Estadão';

-- Corrigir URL do Safras & Mercado (adicionar flag para ignorar SSL via URL sem https)
-- Mantemos a URL mas o parser agora usa SSL relaxado para safras.com.br
UPDATE rss_feeds SET fetchErrorCount = 0 WHERE name = 'Safras & Mercado';

-- Desativar feeds que retornam 403/404 permanentemente (bloqueiam por IP de servidor)
UPDATE rss_feeds SET active = 0, fetchErrorCount = 99 
WHERE name IN ('Notícias Agrícolas', 'Canal Rural', 'CEPEA / ESALQ', 'Agrolink', 'CNA Brasil', 'NOAA Climate', 'USDA Blog', 'IMEA');

-- Adicionar feeds do Google News RSS (funcionam sem restrições)
INSERT IGNORE INTO rss_feeds (name, url, category, active, fetchErrorCount, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  ('Google News - Agronegócio Brasil', 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=agronegocio+brasil&hl=pt-BR&gl=BR&ceid=BR:pt-419', 'mercado', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('Google News - Soja e Milho', 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=soja+milho+commodities+brasil&hl=pt-BR&gl=BR&ceid=BR:pt-419', 'commodities', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('Google News - Clima Agrícola', 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=clima+safra+agricultura+brasil&hl=pt-BR&gl=BR&ceid=BR:pt-419', 'clima', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('Google News - Crédito Rural', 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=credito+rural+financiamento+agro+brasil&hl=pt-BR&gl=BR&ceid=BR:pt-419', 'politica_agricola', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('NOAA Weather RSS', 'https://www.weather.gov/rss_page.php?site_name=nws', 'clima', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW());

-- Mantemos a URL mas o parser agora usa SSL relaxado para safras.com.br
UPDATE rss_feeds SET fetchErrorCount = 0 WHERE name = 'Safras & Mercado';

WHERE name IN ('Notícias Agrícolas', 'Canal Rural', 'CEPEA / ESALQ', 'Agrolink', 'CNA Brasil', 'NOAA Climate', 'USDA Blog', 'IMEA');

-- Adicionar feeds do Google News RSS (funcionam sem restrições)
INSERT IGNORE INTO rss_feeds (name, url, category, active, fetchErrorCount, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  ('Google News - Agronegócio Brasil', 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=agronegocio+brasil&hl=pt-BR&gl=BR&ceid=BR:pt-419', 'mercado', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('Google News - Soja e Milho', 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=soja+milho+commodities+brasil&hl=pt-BR&gl=BR&ceid=BR:pt-419', 'commodities', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('Google News - Clima Agrícola', 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=clima+safra+agricultura+brasil&hl=pt-BR&gl=BR&ceid=BR:pt-419', 'clima', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW()),

  ('NOAA Weather RSS', 'https://www.weather.gov/rss_page.php?site_name=nws', 'clima', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW());
